perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair, wearing a white blouse and a gold necklace, films herself in a selfie-style POV on a street in Seoul, pointing to her eye and smiling. (2) The video cuts to a series of fast-paced shots showing massive digital billboards on skyscrapers. The first shows Jisoo for Dior Addict. (3) Subsequent shots display vibrant, high-definition advertisements featuring BABYMONSTER, NCT members, actor Park Seo-joon for Classys, Karina from aespa, and other K-pop/K-drama stars in a dense urban setting with traffic and modern architecture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice counts 'Yi, er, san' (One, two, three) in Mandarin Chinese over low ambient city noise. (2) A rhythmic, upbeat electronic pop track starts abruptly. A stylized whisper of the word 'Dior' is heard as the first billboard appears. (3) The electronic music maintains a steady, high-tempo beat with bass emphasis throughout the montage of billboard displays, with no further speech or significant ambient sound.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV 🇰🇷在韓國一定要睜大眼睛的原因 You really can't zone out in Seoul - Hook text establishing the 'why' of the video. (2) 路上每五分鐘就出現一次你的偶像😂 - Descriptive text explaining that idols appear every five minutes on the street, using a laughing emoji for a lighthearted tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; others are celebrities appearing on digital screens (Jisoo, Karina, Park Seo-joon, etc.)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white v-neck blouse and a delicate gold necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern urban cityscape of Seoul, specifically the COEX/Gangnam area, featuring high-rise buildings, glass-walled skyscrapers, and massive LED display screens.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the high density of celebrity advertisements and the vibrant fan-culture atmosphere in Seoul's commercial districts, targeting travelers and K-pop fans.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brands shown are part of the environmental scenery (billboards) rather than products actively promoted by the creator.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Mandarin-speaking female traveler in Korea trope.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses beat-sync editing to match the cuts of the billboards with the electronic music, enhancing the 'cool city' aesthetic.
